description: Refactor duplicated topbar composition logic across frontend pages into shared builders and reinforce regression coverage.

userStories.title: Introduce shared marketplace topbar action bundle builder
userStories.description: As a frontend engineer, I want one helper to build primary and utility topbar actions so that pages stop duplicating action composition logic.
acceptanceCriteria: Bundle helper returns primaryActions and utilityActions with behavior parity to existing builders

userStories.title: Add session-aware workspace/login right-side registration helper
userStories.description: As a frontend engineer, I want one helper for signed-in and signed-out topbar CTA registrations so that right-side action rules are centralized.
acceptanceCriteria: Helper resolves dark-status and dark-cta using session presence and toPublicPath
Helper supports workspacePath and loginPath overrides

userStories.title: Refactor marketplace home and category-detail pages to shared action bundle
userStories.description: As a maintainer, I want marketplace pages to consume the same topbar bundle helper so that future action changes are made in one place.
acceptanceCriteria: Category detail keeps category action active state behavior
Auth action behavior remains unchanged for signed-in and signed-out states
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill

userStories.title: Refactor public pages to shared topbar builders
userStories.description: As a maintainer, I want categories, rankings, docs, and skill detail pages to reuse shared topbar builders so that navigation behavior is consistent and easier to maintain.
acceptanceCriteria: PublicCategoriesPage, PublicRankingPage, PublicDocsPage, and PublicSkillDetailPage consume shared topbar action helpers
Signed-in and signed-out CTA labels and targets stay consistent with existing copy
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill

userStories.title: Add and update regression tests for topbar composition helpers
userStories.description: As a maintainer, I want focused tests for new helper abstractions so that refactors do not break topbar action behavior.
acceptanceCriteria: Add tests for buildMarketplaceTopbarActionBundle behavior in MarketplaceHomePage.lightTopbar test suite
Add tests for buildMarketplaceWorkspaceAccessRightRegistrations default and custom path behavior
Keep existing topbar registration tests green

userStories.title: Run full frontend verification and record evidence
userStories.description: As a reviewer, I want complete verification evidence for the refactor so that maintainability improvements can be accepted safely.
acceptanceCriteria: Run frontend verification commands: npm run test:unit, npm run test:e2e, npm run test:visual, npm run build
Visual verification reports mismatch ratio and artifact paths
